msg_idle_warning: %s in %d seconds. Move the mouse, press any key, or close this notice to cancel.
msg_autostart_disabled: IdleTrigger will no longer start with Windows.
cli_usage:
Usage: IdleTrigger <command>

Commands:
  sleep        Put the PC to sleep
  hibernate    Hibernate the PC
  shutdown     Shut down Windows
  restart      Restart Windows
  lock         Lock the workstation
  nosleep      Stay Awake (on|off|toggle|status)
  monitor      Idle monitor (on|off|status)
  diagnostics  Raw idle timing (idle [--watch])
  autostart    Start with Windows (enable|disable|status)
  config:reload Reload the running tray configuration
  status       Show current status
  version      Show version
cli_error_sleep_unavailable: Sleep is not available on this system.
cli_error_hibernate_unavailable: Hibernation is not available on this system.
cli_error_tray_not_running: The tray application is not running.
cli_error_nosleep_requires_tray: Stay Awake requires the tray application to remain running.
cli_error_monitor_requires_tray: The idle monitor requires the tray application to remain running.
warning_config_defaults: Warning: failed to load the configuration; using defaults:
config_edit_hint: Changes apply automatically within a few seconds. Restart IdleTrigger or run config:reload to apply them immediately.
cli_unknown: Unknown command. Run without arguments to start the tray icon.
tip_lock: Lock the current Windows session now.
tip_quick_actions: Lock, sleep, hibernate, shut down, or restart. Save your work first.
tip_sleep: Put the system to sleep now.
tip_shutdown: Shut down now. Save your work first.
tip_restart: Restart now. Save your work first.
tip_nosleep: Prevent automatic sleep. Screen and battery options are in the config file.
tip_process_watch: When Stay Awake is on, keep awake only while a listed exe runs. This does not change idle monitoring.
tip_process_watch_empty: No processes configured. Add exe names to process_watch_list; an empty list has no process limit.
tip_idle: Run the selected action after no keyboard or mouse input. Pauses while Stay Awake is on.
tip_idle_warning: Show a non-activating reminder before the action. Its duration is set in IdleTrigger.toml.
tip_idle_enhanced: Use if Windows repeatedly resets idle time. Learns the pattern; normal input still resets the timer.
tip_idle_timeout: Choose how long input must be idle before the action runs.
tip_idle_action: Choose sleep, hibernate, shut down, or lock after idle time.
tip_theme: Switch Windows light/dark theme by time or sunrise/sunset. Manual location takes priority; IP location is optional.
tip_fullscreen: Pause automatic theme switching in fullscreen.
tip_battery_theme: Use dark mode on battery; restore the schedule on AC power.
tip_ip_location: Use public-IP location for sunrise/sunset. Results are cached for 24 hours; set coordinates to avoid network lookup.
tip_theme_switch: Switch between light and dark themes now.
tip_theme_repair: Reapply the current theme if windows or displays did not update.
tip_hotkeys: Win+Shift+S sleep; Win+Shift+L lock; Win+Shift+N toggles Stay Awake.
tip_autostart: Start in the tray after Windows sign-in; repair the path automatically.
tip_logging: Write diagnostics to IdleTrigger.log. Keep this off normally.
tip_language: Apply and save the language change now.
tip_config: Open IdleTrigger.toml in Notepad for advanced settings.
tip_exit: Exit the tray app and stop all active features.
